productDisplayName: Basics Men Black Slim Fit Checked Shirt
description: Composition Black and white plaid check shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar, buttoned front placket, double patch pocket on the upper left chest with buttoned flaps, brand tab towards right hem, stitch detailing on the shoulders and a curved hemline Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Hang dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on print or embroidery The stitch detailing on the shoulders and cleverly mitired double patch pockets on the upper left chest adds rugged styling to this plaid check shirt from basics, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'11' and shoulders 17.5"
